Variables.Name: OutputName
Variables.Description: The output's name, which will be drawn on the connector in function call expressions that use this function.

Variables.Name: Description
Variables.Description: The output's description, which will be used as a tooltip on the connector in function call expressions that use this function.

Variables.Name: SortPriority
Variables.Description: Controls where the output is displayed relative to the other outputs.

Variables.Name: A
Variables.Description: Stores the expression in the material function connected to this output.

Variables.Name: bLastPreviewed
Variables.Description: Whether this output was previewed the last time this function was edited.

Variables.Name: Id
Variables.Description: Id of this input, used to maintain references through name changes.
